problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
hypothesis: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Attention. Attention mechanism with linear complexity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
